purpose: Map BIVE engineering surfaces to qualified scientific and operational sources without pretending that the repository is a validated lie detector.
hard_boundaries: BIVE must not emit person-level liar, guilt, intent, diagnosis, or legal conclusions.
BIVE may structure transcript evidence, contradictions, uncertainty, missing evidence, and review questions.
Physiology, affect, cognition, and neurobehavioral claims require modality-specific data, baselines, context, and human review.
Scientific references justify design constraints and audit questions, not automatic truth inference. Apparently this needs writing down because software keeps trying to become astrology with JSON.
BIVE forbids automatic lie detection as a machine output.
BIVE forbids automatic liar label as a machine output.
BIVE forbids guilt inference as a machine output.
BIVE forbids intent inference as a machine output.
BIVE treats neuroscience, psychophysiology and multimodal ML as bounded design/evaluation inputs, not as authority for person-level truth, intent or diagnosis.

disciplines.name: Behavioral deception research
disciplines.operational_use: Keep deception-related language probabilistic, context-bound, and human-review-only.

disciplines.name: Psychophysiology
disciplines.operational_use: Require baseline, sensor quality, temporal alignment, and confound controls before physiological claims.

disciplines.name: Cognitive science and judgment under uncertainty
disciplines.operational_use: Force alternative hypotheses, uncertainty fields, and missing-evidence lists.

disciplines.name: Affective computing and human-computer interaction
disciplines.operational_use: Separate affect-related UI/interaction concepts from unsupported mental-state inference.

disciplines.name: Computational linguistics and discourse analysis
disciplines.operational_use: Use textual features as weak evidence surfaces, never as standalone verdicts.

disciplines.name: AI risk management and secure software engineering
disciplines.operational_use: Map model/system risk to gates, logs, provenance, release evidence, and fail-closed decisions.

disciplines.name: Accessible operational interface design
disciplines.operational_use: Treat UI as a safety surface: readable hierarchy, keyboard operation, semantic sections, and predictable feedback.

disciplines.name: Neurophysiology and predictive-processing theory
disciplines.operational_use: Represent brain-inspired ideas only as design metaphors for uncertainty, priors, prediction error and feedback, not as proof of mental-state access.

disciplines.name: Psychophysiological measurement and emotion regulation
disciplines.operational_use: Require sensor provenance, baseline windows, temporal alignment, confound registers and manual interpretation for any physiological extension.

disciplines.name: Multimodal machine learning and evaluation science
disciplines.operational_use: Keep multimodal extensions dataset-bound, benchmarked, ablated and separated from unsupported real-world verdicts.

disciplines.name: Data provenance and operational reproducibility
disciplines.operational_use: Tie every artifact, dataset, dependency graph and generated report to traceable provenance and reproducible verification gates.

references.title: Nonverbal Leakage and Clues to Deception
references.operational_mapping: Supports treating nonverbal leakage as context-sensitive cue evidence, not deterministic verdict output.
references.claim_boundary: Historical foundation; not proof that BIVE can infer deception without validated multimodal data.

references.title: Detecting Lies and Deceit: Pitfalls and Opportunities, 2nd Edition
references.operational_mapping: Supports explicit limitations, human review, modality separation, and skepticism toward single-method detection.
references.claim_boundary: Review source; does not license automated accusations.

references.title: Lying Words: Predicting Deception From Linguistic Styles
references.operational_mapping: Supports using language features only as weak, reviewable evidence candidates with alternatives and uncertainty.
references.claim_boundary: Dataset/task-specific linguistic patterns; not universal truth inference.

references.title: Affective Computing
references.operational_mapping: Supports treating affective systems as human-facing socio-technical systems with ethical and interaction constraints.
references.claim_boundary: Framework source; not a validation of BIVE affect inference.

references.title: Judgment under Uncertainty: Heuristics and Biases
references.operational_mapping: Supports bias-aware review prompts and the prohibition against intuitive certainty from sparse cues.
references.claim_boundary: General judgment science; not a direct deception-detector method.

references.title: Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0)
references.operational_mapping: Supports risk governance, validity, reliability, transparency, accountability, and managed deployment posture.
references.claim_boundary: This does not validate BIVE by itself; implementation evidence must still come from repository gates and domain review.

references.title: Secure Software Development Framework (SSDF) Version 1.1
references.operational_mapping: Supports release controls, vulnerability management, secure implementation, and evidence-backed software practices.
references.claim_boundary: Security framework; does not replace dependency audit and threat modeling.

references.title: OWASP API Security Top 10 2023
references.operational_mapping: Supports strict auth boundaries, object/property authorization, payload limits, and unrestricted-resource-consumption controls.
references.claim_boundary: Risk list; not a full security proof.

references.title: Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.2
references.operational_mapping: Supports semantic UI, keyboard operation, predictable feedback, focus visibility, and accessible review surfaces.
references.claim_boundary: This does not validate BIVE by itself; implementation evidence must still come from repository gates and domain review.

references.title: The free-energy principle: a unified brain theory?
references.operational_mapping: Supports prediction-error and uncertainty language as a systems-design analogy for feedback and model correction.
references.claim_boundary: This is not evidence that BIVE can infer neural state, intent, deception, or truth from text.

references.title: The prefrontal cortex - an update: time is of the essence
references.operational_mapping: Supports treating temporal organization, context and working memory constraints as relevant to review workflows.
references.claim_boundary: This does not validate automated cognition, intention or deception inference.

references.title: The emerging field of emotion regulation: an integrative review
references.operational_mapping: Supports separating emotion-related concepts from simplistic affect labels and requiring context over time.
references.claim_boundary: This is not a license for BIVE to diagnose emotion or mental state.

references.title: Handbook of Psychophysiology, 3rd Edition
references.operational_mapping: Supports requiring measurement validity, sensor provenance, baselines and confound control for physiological data.
references.claim_boundary: This is not proof that physiology can identify deception or guilt in BIVE.

references.title: Multimodal Language Analysis in the Wild: CMU-MOSEI Dataset and Interpretable Dynamic Fusion Graph
references.operational_mapping: Supports explicit multimodal dataset and fusion evaluation planning for future extensions.
references.claim_boundary: This is not deception validation and does not generalize BIVE to real-world truth detection.

references.title: Deception Detection using Real-life Trial Data
references.operational_mapping: Supports dataset-bound evaluation thinking for multimodal deception research.
references.claim_boundary: Dataset-specific research is not production proof and not authority for automated accusations.

references.title: PROV-O: The PROV Ontology
references.operational_mapping: Supports artifact lineage, evidence source mapping and reproducible generated outputs.
references.claim_boundary: Provenance structure does not prove evidence truth or model validity.

references.title: pip-audit Python dependency vulnerability scanner
references.operational_mapping: Supports dependency vulnerability audit gate and fail-closed UNKNOWN state when advisory lookup is unavailable.
references.claim_boundary: A clean audit is not a full security proof and does not replace threat modeling.

references.title: OpenSSF Scorecard
references.operational_mapping: Supports open-source security posture automation for GitHub repositories.
references.claim_boundary: Scorecard automation is not a guarantee of secure behavior or production readiness.
